vnpayDemo.title: VNPAY Payment
vnpayDemo.subtitle: The system creates a secure payment link. Click to go to the VNPAY gateway.
vnpayDemo.amountHint: e.g. 100000. Amount displays per VNPAY standard.
vnpayDemo.invalidAmount: Enter a valid positive integer amount.
vnpayDemo.createFailed: Could not create payment. Please try again later.
vnpayDemo.networkError: Connection error. Please check your network and try again.

vnpayResult.successLead: Thank you for paying with VNPAY. We’re updating your order — this usually takes just a few seconds.
vnpayResult.failLead: The payment may not have been accepted or was cancelled on VNPAY. You can try again or choose another payment method.
vnpayResult.reasonExplainChecksum: Could not verify security signature with VNPAY. Please try the payment again or contact support.
vnpayResult.reasonExplainConfig: VNPAY payment is not fully configured. Please try again later or contact support.
vnpayResult.reasonExplainUnknown: Something went wrong while handling the return. Try paying again or contact support with a screenshot.
vnpayResult.successIpnHint: If your order status hasn’t changed yet, wait a few seconds, open Profile to check your orders, or refresh the page.
vnpayResult.returnNote: This page shows the Return URL (browser) result.
vnpayResult.ipnNote: Order status is updated automatically after payment.

payment.vnpayMaintenanceDesc: We’re upgrading the payment gateway. You can still use online payment, or try again later.
payment.vnpayBlockedSubmit: VNPay is under maintenance — please try again later to pay online.

auth.welcomeBack: Welcome back, a new journey awaits
auth.loginUnknownUser: No account found with this email.
auth.loginMissingEmail: Please enter your email or username.
auth.registerSubtitle: Choose your role and fill in your details to get started.
auth.passwordHint: {{min}}–{{max}} characters, at least 1 uppercase and 1 special character
auth.errUsernameMax: Username must be at most {{max}} characters.
auth.errUsernamePattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers and underscores (_).
auth.errEmailMax: Email must be at most {{max}} characters.
auth.errPasswordMax: Password must be at most {{max}} characters.
auth.errPasswordUppercase: Password must have at least 1 uppercase letter.
auth.errPasswordSpecial: Password must have at least 1 special character (!@#$%^&*...).
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your registered email. We will send a password reset link.
auth.forgotGenericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth.checkEmailDesc: If an account with email <1>{{email}}</1> exists, you will receive instructions to reset your password.
auth.noEmailHint: Didn't receive the email? Check spam or try again in a few minutes.
auth.errResetLinkInvalid: Reset link is invalid or expired.
auth.errResetLinkExpired: Link may have expired. Please request a new one.
auth.resetSuccessDesc: You can now log in with your new password.
auth.resetInvalidDesc: The password reset link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one from the Forgot password page.
auth.resetFormSubtitle: Enter a new password for your account. Password must be 8–64 characters with at least 1 uppercase letter and 1 special character.

home.heroSlogan1: Inspected bikes, ready to hit the road
home.heroSlogan2: Start your next journey with ShopBike
home.loadError: Could not load listings. Using fallback data.
home.noResultsHint: Try different keywords or clear filters.

profile.privacyDesc: Contact information is protected until the transaction is confirmed.
profile.noOrdersHint: No orders yet. See marketplace to place an order.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.emptyHint: Click the heart icon on a bike to add it to your wishlist.
wishlist.someUnavailable: Some listings may no longer be available.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.buyerPurchasedTitle: Buyer purchased – please ship bike to warehouse
notifications.buyerPurchasedMessage: Order {{orderId}} ({{bikeName}}). Please transport the bike to the warehouse.
notifications.buyerPurchasedDirectTitle: Buyer purchased – ship directly to buyer
notifications.buyerPurchasedDirectMessage: Order {{orderId}} ({{bikeName}}). Unverified listing: no warehouse. Please deliver directly to the buyer’s address.
notifications.depositPaidReleaseWarehouseMessage: Order {{orderId}} ({{bikeName}}). Deposit complete. Release from warehouse and ship.
notifications.warehouseAwaitShipMessage: Order {{orderId}} ({{bikeName}}). Please transport the bike to the warehouse.
notifications.warehouseAwaitVerifyMessage: Order {{orderId}} ({{bikeName}}). Bike is waiting for warehouse verification. Admin will confirm upon arrival.
notifications.inspectorApprovedMessage: Listing {{bikeName}} has been approved. Please ship the bike to the warehouse for admin confirmation.

support.title: Support & FAQ
support.subtitle: Find answers or contact ShopBike support.
support.sellerFlow: Register as Seller → Create listing with photos and description → Submit for inspection → Inspector approves → Listing appears on marketplace.
support.faqDesc: Answers about buying and selling sports bikes.
support.faqSafeBuyAns: All listings on ShopBike are inspected before publication. You can view the detailed inspection report on the product page.
support.faqDepositAns: Choose bike → Payment → Deposit → Transaction confirmed within 24h → Pay balance and receive bike.
support.faqSeller: What does the seller need to do to list?
support.docsHint: See <0>home</0> and <1>Profile</1> for more about the process.

forbidden.title: 403 Access denied
forbidden.description: Your current account cannot access this page. Please go back to an appropriate page or sign in with another account.

listing.notFoundDesc: The listing you're looking for doesn't exist.
listing.inspectionReportDesc: Content filled by inspector when approving listing, shown to buyers.
listing.scoreFromOverall: Scores above are temporary from overall score. Detailed description (inspector notes) will show when full report is available.
listing.pendingInspection: Pending inspection. Inspector will review this listing and add report.
listing.noInspectionScore: No inspection score yet. Listing will be updated after inspector approval.
listing.reservationNote: Reservation is valid after deposit payment at checkout and held for 24 hours.
listing.pendingBlock: Pending inspection. This listing is under review and not yet available for sale.
listing.notAvailable: This listing is not available for purchase.

admin.title: Admin Channel
admin.subtitle: Manage users, listings, inspection queue, reviews, categories, transactions and warehouse confirmation.
admin.vnpayDemoHint: Configure Return URL and IPN in deployment environment.
admin.warehouseIntakeTitle: Confirm bike at warehouse — match photos (round 2)
admin.warehouseIntakeDesc: After online approval, the seller shipped the bike. Verify it matches the listing photos, then confirm — the listing becomes CERTIFIED and goes live. This is separate from order warehouse steps after a buyer purchases.
admin.inspectionDesc: Admins and inspectors share the same API: approve listings on the Inspector page. Here you only see the queue; use the button below for the full review form.
admin.sellerPackagesDesc: View package status, recent package orders (PackageOrder), and revoke a package (clears plan + expiry on the account). Order history stays in the database.
admin.sellerPackagesRevokeConfirm: Revoke this seller's listing package? They cannot publish new listings until they purchase again.
admin.warehouseDesc: Listings: after inspector approval, seller ships to warehouse → admin confirms arrival → inspector re-confirms → listing goes live with certified badge.
admin.warehouseMovedToInspector: {{count}} listing(s) moved to Inspector channel. Go to Inspector to approve.
admin.warehouseSectionAdminConfirm: Waiting for admin to confirm bike arrived at warehouse
admin.warehouseSectionOrdersPendingConfirm: Orders at warehouse pending delivery confirmation
admin.warehouseSectionOrdersPendingConfirmDesc: WAREHOUSE orders (certified bikes at warehouse) — buyer has paid deposit. Confirm to start delivery to buyer.
admin.warehouseSectionStartShipToBuyer: Certified listings with buyer — Confirm start delivery
admin.warehouseSectionStartShipDesc: Orders for certified bikes at warehouse, buyer has purchased. Confirm to move order to shipping status.
admin.usersDesc: Admin can hide or unhide accounts, data is not deleted.
admin.listingsDesc: Admin can hide or unhide listings, data is not deleted.
admin.reviewsDesc: Buyer reviews. Admin can view, edit or hide reviews if content is inappropriate.
admin.categoriesDesc: Add/edit/delete bike categories. Brands are saved to the database and appear in the seller listing form.
admin.categoriesPlaceholder: No categories yet. Add a new category to get started.
admin.categoriesDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
admin.brandsDesc: Add brands here. They will appear in the seller listing form.
admin.brandsEmpty: No brands yet. Add a brand above.
admin.brandsDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this brand?
admin.transactionsDesc: View demo transaction history and configure service fees. Data is stored on the frontend for now.
admin.packagePricesDesc: Edit display prices for BASIC and VIP (demo, stored in the browser). /seller/packages updates immediately; live checkout still uses server pricing.
admin.packagePricesInvalid: Enter valid amounts (≥ 0) for both plans.
admin.statsDesc: Revenue, orders, users overview. (API integration later.)

inspector.title: Inspector Dashboard
inspector.subtitle: Review and approve pending listings.
inspector.approveHint: Online approval (round 1): listing stays off-market — seller ships to warehouse; admin confirms it matches photos (round 2), then PUBLISHED + CERTIFIED. Reject → closed. Request update → seller fixes and resubmits.
inspector.warehouseReInspectionDesc: Admin has confirmed bike arrived. Inspector verifies it matches the listing — Approve → listing goes live with certified badge. Or Request update if it does not match.
inspector.noWarehouseReInspection: No listings awaiting confirmation at warehouse.
inspector.reInspectionDesc: Bike confirmed at warehouse by admin. Inspector verifies it matches seller description, then confirm → order moves to "Shipping".
inspector.dialogApproveDesc: Fill in the online inspection report. After approval, the seller ships to warehouse; admin confirms photos match, then the listing goes live.
inspector.dialogRejectDesc: Listing will be rejected, seller cannot resubmit.
inspector.dialogNeedUpdateDesc: Seller must update per feedback before resubmitting.
inspector.reportHint: After confirming, report content (Frame, Drivetrain, Brakes) will show on bike detail page for buyers.
inspector.detailCommentPlaceholder: Detailed comment (shown to buyers instead of '—')
inspector.detailCommentHint: If empty, selected rating level will show (e.g. Good).
inspector.needUpdatePlaceholder: E.g.: Add full bike photos, clearer drivetrain photos, fix size in title…
inspector.needUpdateHint: This will be shown to seller on dashboard and edit page.
inspector.needUpdateError: Please enter a clear reason (at least 5 characters) for the seller.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Complete your deposit to secure your ride.
checkout.abandonHint: Listing is reserved after you start checkout; complete payment on VNPAY to secure your order. You can return to the transaction page anytime to continue payment if you left the gateway.
checkout.loadError: Could not load checkout. Listing may be invalid.
checkout.fullPaymentDesc: Pay the full amount now. Priority shipping included.
checkout.fullPaymentDescVnpay: Pay the full bike price online via VNPAY only. Cash is not available for full payment.
checkout.depositOnlineDesc: Pay deposit via VNPAY to reserve. Remaining balance paid online on delivery.
checkout.vnpayDepositDesc: Pay 8% of bike price via VNPAY now. Remaining balance paid online on delivery.
checkout.depositCODDesc: Pay deposit now to reserve. Pay the rest upon delivery.
checkout.depositCODDescVnpay: Pay deposit via VNPAY. Remaining balance paid online on delivery.
checkout.cashPayDesc: You’ll pay in cash when you receive the bike (or as agreed with the seller). Bike checkout on ShopBike does not redirect to VNPAY.
checkout.vnpayFullOnlyDesc: The entire amount must be paid through VNPAY. Paying the full price in cash on the platform is not supported.
checkout.vnpayDepositThenCodDesc: You must complete the deposit through VNPAY first. The rest is paid in cash when you receive the bike.
checkout.vnpayRedirectHint: You will be redirected to the VNPAY payment gateway. After payment, you’ll return here to see the result.
checkout.vnpayNeedsRealApi: Could not connect to payment. Please try again later or contact support.
checkout.vnpayNoUrl: No payment URL returned from the server.
checkout.qrSectionHint: Use your banking app or VNPay to scan the code.
checkout.qrVnpayHelp: Scan with your bank app or VNPay to open the payment page.
checkout.cardInfoHint: As per card issuer. Test cards: 4242 4242 4242 4242, 5555 5555 5555 4444
checkout.bankInfoHint: Per bank rules. Account number min 8 digits.
checkout.agreeError: Please agree to the cancellation & refund policy to continue.
checkout.unverifiedBody: The marketplace is not responsible for the actual condition of unverified bikes. Do you understand and accept the risk?
checkout.policyBody: For every purchase: if the bike is unverified, the marketplace is not responsible for its actual condition — inspect carefully and you accept the risk. If verified, the inspection report is for reference only; you should still inspect the bike before accepting delivery. Do you confirm you have read this and agree to continue?
checkout.errBankAccount: Account number must be at least 8 digits
checkout.validatePaymentError: Payment validation failed. Please try again or pick another method.
checkout.createOrderError: Failed to create order. Please try again.
checkout.finalizeMissingOrder: Missing order info. Please go back to the transaction page.
checkout.finalizeCompleteError: Could not complete order. Please try again.
checkout.finalizeNotFoundDesc: Page could not load due to invalid listing ID.
checkout.finalizeReservedHint: After you place an order, the listing is no longer public, so this page needs your order ID. Open it again from the transaction page (button below) or use a URL with ?orderId=...
checkout.finalizeSubtitle: Pay the balance and confirm delivery.
checkout.successErrRating: Please select a rating from 1 to 5 stars.
checkout.successMissingOrder: Missing order info to submit review.
checkout.successSubmitReviewError: Could not submit review. Please try again.
checkout.successReviewDesc: Your review helps other buyers and affects the seller's reputation. Admin can view and approve reviews.
checkout.successReviewPlaceholder: Share briefly about the bike, transaction, delivery...
checkout.successReviewDisclaimer: The review will be displayed after being recorded. Admin can edit or hide reviews if violations are detected.
checkout.successThankYou: Thank you for shopping at ShopBike. Your order is saved at

transaction.title: Transaction
transaction.nextStepDesc: Confirm and complete payment. You'll be notified when the order is ready for delivery.
transaction.nextStepDescDirect: The seller will deliver the bike to your address; then you confirm receipt. Countdown starts when the seller marks shipped.
transaction.sellerNotify: Seller will receive notification and send bike to warehouse
transaction.sellerNotifyDirect: Seller will be notified and will deliver the bike to your address
transaction.directStepSellerShipTitle: Waiting for seller to deliver to you
transaction.sellerShipped: Seller has shipped, bike on the way to warehouse
transaction.adminConfirm: Admin confirms bike arrived at warehouse
transaction.waitPaymentDone: Payment done, waiting for seller to deliver.
transaction.waitSellerShip: Waiting for seller to ship to warehouse.
transaction.waitSellerShipDirect: Waiting for the seller to deliver to your address.
transaction.bikeEnRoute: Bike arriving at warehouse / awaiting admin confirmation.
transaction.orderInProgress: Order is being processed. Platform will update when there's progress.
transaction.orderInProgressDirect: Direct delivery: seller ships to you → you confirm receipt. No warehouse / re-inspection step.
transaction.refundPolicyNote: Refund policy applies • Cancellation limit to prevent spam
transaction.cancelDialogDesc: Are you sure you want to cancel? Refund will be processed per policy (within 7 days). Cancellation limit: max 3 per rolling 7-day window.
transaction.cancelLimitReached: You have reached the cancellation limit: max 3 times per 7 days. Please try again later.
transaction.cancelFailed: Could not cancel the order. Please try again.
transaction.payDepositOnlineRestCod: Deposit paid via VNPAY; pay remainder via VNPay to complete
transaction.pendingVnpayBannerDesc: Your order is on hold until the online payment succeeds. Use the button below to return to the VNPAY gateway (same order, no duplicate reservation).
transaction.resumeVnpayError: Could not open payment. Try again.
transaction.depositPendingVnpayProgress: Complete deposit payment on VNPAY to confirm your reservation
transaction.waitCompleteVnpayDeposit: Complete the online payment (VNPAY) to confirm your deposit. Then the seller will be notified.
transaction.waitingForShippingStart: Waiting for shipping to start. You'll be notified when the order is on the way.

seller.title: Seller channel
seller.subtitle: Manage listings, inspection and publishing.
seller.inventoryNote: Draft/Needs update can be edited. Pending review locks edit. Published limits content changes.
seller.newDraftHint: Create draft first, then submit for inspection.
seller.waitingWarehouseVerify: Waiting for admin to confirm bike matches photos
seller.workflow: Draft → Publish unverified or optional inspection → Live.
seller.pendingInspectionWarning: This listing is pending inspection. Cannot edit until result.
seller.pleaseUpdateAndResubmit: Please update per feedback above, save draft and resubmit for inspection.
seller.imagesHint: Each box matches a checklist item. Required before submitting for inspection.
seller.publishNote: Publish now with an Unverified badge (30 days). With a VIP plan you can submit for inspection to earn a Certified badge after inspector approval.
seller.packagePageSubtitle: Subscribe to post listings. Pay via VNPay.
seller.packageSlots: Up to {{count}} live listings · {{days}} days each
seller.packageVnpayNote: Redirect to VNPay to pay with domestic card or bank account.
seller.packagePopupBlocked: Browser blocked the new tab. Open this link manually:
seller.packageOpenedSameOriginHint: The new tab uses the same address as this page (so you stay logged in).
seller.packageDemoPayBody: Confirm to activate your package after payment, or cancel to clear the URL.
seller.packageQrHint: Scan with your bank app after creating an order.
seller.packageVnpayReturnSuccess: Payment successful! Your package is being activated. If you don't see the update yet, please wait a few seconds and refresh the page.
seller.packageVnpayReturnFail: Payment was not completed or was cancelled on VNPAY.
seller.packageSimulateError: Could not activate package. Please try again.
seller.packageNoBuyUntilExpired: Gói đang còn hạn. Chỉ mua được khi hết hạn.
seller.packageUpgradePrice: Upgrade from Basic (only pay the difference)
seller.packageRevokedForDemo: Đã gỡ gói. Có thể mua lại để demo.
seller.packageNeedBody: You need an active listing package to create or publish. View packages?
seller.inspectionVipOnlyHint: Inspection is included with the VIP plan only (not sold separately).
seller.inspectionVipOnlyError: Only the VIP plan can submit listings for inspection. Please upgrade.
seller.listingUnverifiedHint: Not verified by the platform. Inspect the bike carefully before purchase.
seller.slotLimitReached: You have reached your package listing limit. Remove a listing or upgrade to VIP.
seller.saveDraftError: Could not save draft. Please try again.
seller.yearFuture: Model year cannot be after the current year ({{max}}).
seller.uploadImagesError: Could not upload images. Check your connection and file type (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF; max 5MB each).
seller.submitError: Could not submit for inspection. Please try again.
seller.photoCountError: Please upload all 5 images per checklist (currently {{current}}/5).
seller.errEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
seller.errCardLast4: Please enter 4 digits for card number.
